test_cases.title: Basic navigation: Chat → Settings → Chat with back/forward
test_cases.description: AC-1: Push entries, verify back/forward traversal restores correct view and session
steps: Click session A → verify Chat(A) shown
Click Settings button → verify Settings (providers tab) shown
Click session B → verify Chat(B) shown

test_cases.title: Truncation: push after back discards forward entries
test_cases.description: AC-2: After back, a new push truncates the forward branch
steps: Push Chat(A), Settings, Chat(B) → back to Settings (pointer=1)
Verify stack is [Chat(A), Settings, Chat(C)] pointer=2

test_cases.title: Settings tab restore on back navigation
test_cases.description: AC-3: Back to Settings restores previously active tab
steps: Back → verify Settings shows skills tab

test_cases.title: Back closes Settings and returns to Chat
test_cases.description: AC-4: Back from Settings returns to previous Chat entry
steps: Stack: [Chat(A), Settings, Chat(B)], push Settings → pointer=3

test_cases.title: Back/Forward button disabled state
test_cases.description: AC-5: Buttons disabled when at stack boundary
steps: Push Chat(A) → both disabled (pointer at end, length 1)
Push Settings → back enabled, forward disabled

test_cases.title: ESC in Settings triggers back
test_cases.description: AC-6: ESC in Settings without modal open triggers navigation back

test_cases.title: ESC in Settings with modal open does not trigger back
test_cases.description: AC-6: Modal intercepts ESC, navigation back is skipped
steps: Open Settings, open a modal (e.g., confirmation dialog)
Verify modal closes but Settings view remains

test_cases.title: Cmd+, from Chat opens Settings
test_cases.description: FR-4: Global Cmd+, shortcut pushes Settings entry
steps: Verify Settings shown (providers tab or last tab)

test_cases.title: Cmd+, from Settings toggles back to Chat
test_cases.description: FR-4: Cmd+, in Settings triggers back (via IPC toggle)
steps: Verify Chat view shown (back to previous entry)

test_cases.title: NavigationStore: capacity limit at 50 entries
test_cases.description: C-4: Stack discards oldest when exceeding 50, pointer adjusted

test_cases.title: NavigationStore: updateCurrentTab updates Settings entry in place
test_cases.description: FR-2: Tab switch updates current Settings entry's activeTab

test_cases.title: NavigationStore: getLastSettingsTab fallback
test_cases.description: ID-1: Returns 'providers' when no Settings entry exists in stack

test_cases.title: Panel integrity: navigation does not affect panel tree
test_cases.description: FR-5: Verify panel tree structure unchanged after navigation operations
steps: Create split panel with sessions A and B
Verify panel tree still shows A and B in their original positions

test_cases.title: Session click in Settings switches to Chat
test_cases.description: FR-3: Clicking session while in Settings pushes Chat and switches view
steps: Verify Settings entry still in history (can back to it)
